name: yugabytedb-mcp-server
description: Query your YugabyteDB or PostgreSQL database from Claude with read and write tools.
long_description:
Connect Claude to a YugabyteDB or PostgreSQL database and use natural language to summarize schemas, run read-only SELECTs, and execute INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL statements behind a configurable guardrail layer.

**Tools**

- **Summarize database** — list tables, columns, and row counts for a schema
- **Run a read-only SQL query** — wrap any SELECT in BEGIN READ ONLY
- **Run a write SQL query (with guardrails)** — INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE/TRUNCATE/DDL, with a configurable blocklist for destructive ops (DROP DATABASE, ALTER SYSTEM, COPY, dblink, role/privilege ops, multi-statement, psql meta-commands) and per-statement row-limit enforcement

**Defense in depth**: write operations are marked `destructiveHint: true` so Claude Desktop surfaces a confirmation before each call, even though the guardrails reject the most dangerous statement classes.

**Self-hosted remote mode** (advanced): when `MCP_AUTH_PROVIDER=cognito`, the server runs as a Streamable HTTP MCP behind AWS Cognito OAuth.
_TODO_icon: TODO: drop a 512x512 PNG at assets/icon.png and replace this field with `"icon": "assets/icon.png"`.
_TODO_screenshots: TODO: capture 3-5 PNGs (>=1000px wide) of the tools in Claude Desktop, save under assets/screenshots/, and add a `"screenshots": [...]` field.

tools.name: summarize_database
tools.description: List all tables in a schema with column names, data types, and row counts.

tools.name: run_read_only_query
tools.description: Execute a SELECT query under BEGIN READ ONLY and return the result rows as JSON.

tools.name: run_write_query
tools.description: Execute an INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE/TRUNCATE/DDL statement after passing a guardrail blocklist. Destructive operations (DROP DATABASE, ALTER SYSTEM, role/privilege changes, COPY, etc.) are rejected.

_TODO_privacy_policies: TODO: legal team to confirm Yugabyte's privacy policy covers MCP server usage (data collection, retention, third-party sharing, contact). Replace with `"privacy_policies": ["https://www.yugabyte.com/privacy-policy/"]` once confirmed.

yugabytedb_url.title: Database connection string
yugabytedb_url.description: libpq keyword string for your YugabyteDB or PostgreSQL database (e.g. `host=cloud.yugabyte.com port=5433 dbname=yugabyte user=admin password=… sslmode=require`).

max_insert_rows.title: Maximum rows per INSERT VALUES
max_insert_rows.description: Reject INSERT … VALUES statements with more rows than this. Default 1000.

require_where_on_update.title: Require WHERE clause on UPDATE
require_where_on_update.description: Reject any UPDATE without a WHERE clause. Off by default.

require_where_on_delete.title: Require WHERE clause on DELETE
require_where_on_delete.description: Reject any DELETE without a WHERE clause. Off by default.
